For osteoporosis with or without pathological fracture, beneficiaries must have at least one inpatient, 
skilled nursing facility (SNF), or home health claim, or two Part B (institutional or non-institutional) 
claims that are at least one day apart, with an osteoporosis with or without pathological fracture code 
in any position during the two-year reference period.
